nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Buff-bellied tanager
nodes.summary: Buff-bellied tanager（Thlypopsis inornata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Buff-bellied tanager。

nodes.name: Buff-bellied tanager
nodes.summary: The buff-bellied tanager (Thlypopsis inornata) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. Distribution and habitat It is found in Peru and far southern Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The buff-bellied tanager (Thlypopsis inornata) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. Distribution and habitat It is found in Peru…

nodes.name: Thlypopsis
nodes.summary: Thlypopsis（Thlypopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Orange-headed tanager、Buff-bellied tanager、Rust-and-yellow tanager等6种鸟类。
